song_name: Born In The Usa Electric Nebraska
version_description: Link to the version tabbed: https://youtu.be/9YNufvgPP20.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
BORN IN THE U.S.A. (ELECTRIC NEBRASKA)
As recorded by Bruce Springsteen
(From the 2025 Album NEBRASKA '82: EXPANDED EDITION)


Version tabbed: https://youtu.be/9YNufvgPP20


[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born down in a dead man's town[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
The first kick I took was when I hit the ground[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
End up like a dog that's been beat too much[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
'Til you spend half your life just to cover it up[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Got in a little hometown jam[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
So they put a rifle in my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Sent me off to a foreign land[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Said, "Son, go and kill the yellow man"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
I was born in the U.S.A.​[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.​[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Come back home to the refineries[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
Hirin' man said, "Son, if it was up to me"[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I went down to see my V.A. man[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Said, "Son, don't you understand?"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.​[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.​[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]

[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I had a brother, he stood at Khe Sanh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Fightin' off them Viet Cong[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]G[/ch]
They're still there but he's all gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
He had a little girl in Saigon[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I got a picture of him in her arms[/tab]


[Guitar Solo]
[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Now down in the shadows of the penitentiary[/tab]
